subcodes.first_line: O Divine Physician! Though bodily ailments be severe, yet the difficulty lies in treating the diseases [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طبیب روحانی امراض جسمانی هر چند شدید است ولی صعوبت در معالجات امراض
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @martyrs and martyrdom
